name: TestWaitForFrSymbol
title: TestWaitForFrSymbol
description: Waits for the occurrence of a FlexRay symbol on the bus. Should the symbol not occur before the expiration of the time aTimeout, the wait condition is resolved nevertheless.
Consider to set always the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment before the function is called.
Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

parameters.name: aTimeout
parameters.description: Maximum time that should be waited [ms]

description: The following test program waits for the occurrence of different POC state events and symbols on one FlexRay bus.
